Source: https://github.com/B-Con/crypto-algorithms

These files (sha256.c, sha256.h) are taken from Brad Conte's
crypto-algorithms repository. Per the upstream README:

    "This code is released into the public domain free of any
     restrictions. The author requests acknowledgement if the code
     is used, but does not require it. This code is provided free
     of any liability and without any quality claims by the author."

Public domain. No warranty. Acknowledgement: Brad Conte
(brad@bradconte.com).
